title: New Zealand Adult Passport Renewal
description: Renewal (or replacement, if lost, stolen, or damaged) of an adult's New Zealand passport through the Department of Internal Affairs' online passport service. This document describes the eligibility conditions for online renewal, the applicant and identity-referee inputs, the photo and payment requirements, and the standard/urgent processing choice. It does not submit the application; the live govt.nz / passports.govt.nz sources are always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: Department of Internal Affairs, New Zealand Passports (Te Tari Taiwhenua)

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official govt.nz renewal guidance and a directly-read DIA identity referee declaration form (BDM76), cross-checked against independent secondary transcriptions. passports.govt.nz itself blocked automated retrieval of its own pages and the PAS300/PAS310 form PDFs (see VERIFICATION.md); the applicant input fields reflect corroborated secondary descriptions of that form, not a direct read of it. Status remains 'draft'. Fees and processing times are intentionally not encoded as authoritative data.

fields.name: isNzCitizen
fields.label: Are you a New Zealand citizen?
fields.description: A New Zealand passport can only be issued to a New Zealand citizen. Citizens born overseas may first need to register as a citizen by descent, a separate process out of scope here.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility: New Zealand citizenship required

fields.name: isAgeSixteenOrOlder
fields.label: Are you aged 16 or older?
fields.description: This document covers the adult passport process. Applicants under 16 need a child passport, a separate process out of scope here.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility: adult passport is for applicants 16 or older

fields.name: previousPassportStatus
fields.label: What is the status of your most recent New Zealand passport?
fields.description: current = still valid; expired = expired, but less than 24 months ago (still eligible for online renewal); lost_stolen_damaged = report as lost, stolen, or damaged instead of renewing normally. A passport expired 24 months or more ago is not eligible for the online renewal channel and must be applied for by paper form instead (out of scope here).
fields.sourceRef: Renew or replace your adult passport — eligibility for online renewal

fields.name: nameAndDateOfBirthUnchanged
fields.label: Are your name and date of birth the same as on your most recent passport?
fields.description: Online renewal requires your name and date of birth to be unchanged since your most recent passport was issued. If your name has changed (e.g. by marriage or deed poll), you must apply using the paper form with supporting name-change documents instead of this online process.
fields.sourceRef: Renew or replace your adult passport — name/date of birth unchanged for online renewal

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Surname
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Applicant details: Surname

fields.name: allFirstNames
fields.label: All first names
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Applicant details: All first names

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Applicant details: Date of birth

fields.name: placeOfBirthTown
fields.label: Place of birth — town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Applicant details: Place of birth

fields.name: placeOfBirthCountry
fields.label: Place of birth — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Applicant details: Place of birth

fields.name: gender
fields.label: Gender to appear on the passport
fields.description: M = Male, F = Female, X = Indeterminate/unspecified. Must match your most recent passport (see nameAndDateOfBirthUnchanged).
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Applicant details: Gender

fields.name: heightCm
fields.label: Height (cm)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Applicant details: Height

fields.name: eyeColour
fields.label: Eye colour
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Applicant details: Eye colour

fields.name: addressStreet
fields.label: Residential address — street number and name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Contact details: Residential address

fields.name: addressSuburb
fields.label: Residential address — suburb
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Contact details: Residential address

fields.name: addressTownOrCity
fields.label: Residential address — town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Contact details: Residential address

fields.name: addressCountry
fields.label: Residential address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Contact details: Residential address

fields.name: addressPostcode
fields.label: Residential address — postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Contact details: Residential address

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Online applications are managed through email and RealMe login.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Contact details: Email

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Contact phone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +6421234567.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Contact details: Phone number

fields.name: previousPassportNumber
fields.label: Most recent New Zealand passport number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not required if previousPassportStatus is lost_stolen_damaged and the number is unknown.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Previous passport details: Passport number

fields.name: previousPassportIssueDate
fields.label: Issue date of your most recent passport
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Previous passport details: Date of issue

fields.name: previousPassportExpiryDate
fields.label: Expiry date of your most recent passport
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Used to confirm the previousPassportStatus / 24-month online-eligibility window.
fields.sourceRef: PAS300 — Previous passport details: Date of expiry

fields.name: photo
fields.label: Digital passport photo
fields.description: A digital colour photo taken within the last 6 months, portrait orientation, approximately 3:4 or 4:3 aspect ratio, meeting the published New Zealand passport photo standards. Provide as JPEG.
fields.sourceRef: Renew or replace your adult passport — photo requirements

fields.name: refereeGivenNames
fields.label: Identity referee — all first names
fields.description: Personal identifier of a third party; handle as sensitive data. Online renewal requires an identity referee: an adult who holds a valid New Zealand passport, is not the applicant's relative, partner, or spouse, does not live at the applicant's address, and has known the applicant for 12 months or more.
fields.sourceRef: Identity referee or witness; BDM76 Identity Referee Declaration — Referee details

fields.name: refereeSurname
fields.label: Identity referee — surname
fields.description: Personal identifier of a third party; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: BDM76 Identity Referee Declaration — Referee details

fields.name: refereeDateOfBirth
fields.label: Identity referee — date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier of a third party; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.sourceRef: BDM76 Identity Referee Declaration — Referee details

fields.name: refereePassportNumber
fields.label: Identity referee — New Zealand passport number
fields.description: Personal identifier of a third party; handle as sensitive data. The referee must hold a currently valid New Zealand passport.
fields.sourceRef: BDM76 Identity Referee Declaration — Referee details: Valid New Zealand passport number

fields.name: refereePhone
fields.label: Identity referee — contact phone number
fields.description: Personal identifier of a third party; handle as sensitive data. The referee is contacted and asked additional questions to verify the applicant's identity. In international E.164 format, e.g. +6421234567.
fields.sourceRef: BDM76 Identity Referee Declaration — Referee's residential address and contact phone number

fields.name: processingSpeed
fields.label: Processing speed
fields.description: standard = standard processing; urgent = urgent processing, which the Department aims to complete within 3 working days of receipt, subject to demand and a complete application, for an additional fee. Confirm current fees on the live source.
fields.sourceRef: Renew or replace your adult passport — standard and urgent processing

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.label: Payment method
fields.description: card = Credit, debit, or prepaid card; online_banking = Online banking payment. Confirm the current fee on the live source; delivery/courier charges apply separately.
fields.sourceRef: Renew or replace your adult passport — payment
